title: eustachys polystachya
intro: Eustachys polystachya, also known as the shrubby or stick-like Eustachys, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Eustachys polystachya include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support digestive health. Eustachys polystachya can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, with the leaves and stems being the most commonly used parts of the plant.
